title: Mojito Group Serve Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Mojito for the Group | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: Mojito Group Serve Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Mojito for the Group | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum COCKTAILS Mojito jug Real mojitos are made with BACARDÍ́. Press some mint and lime, then pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum and club soda for a refreshing Cuban classic. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A MOJITO GROUP SERVE How to make a Mojito jug 300 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 150 ml lime juice 112.5 ml simple syrup mint leaves top with soda water Punch Bowl Copy mojito jug ingredients Copied! mojito jug recipe One step at a time Step 1 Combine Combine the first three ingredients together in a punch bowl with torn mint leaves. Step 2 Pour Pour mix over crushed ice in individual highball glasses. Step 3 Fizz Top each with club soda. Step 4 Garnish Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge. OUR RECOMMENDED rum COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL rum COCKTAILS Daiquiri (shaken) Skinny Mojito Cuatro Smash DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL rum COCKTAILS SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou FAQS WANT TO KNOW MORE? What is white rum? White rum is usually a light-bodied variant with a soft, sweet taste. It’s often used in light refreshing cocktails, especially favorites, like the Mojito and Daiquiri. How do you make a strawberry mojito? To make a strawberry mojito, simply add fresh strawberries to your glass and press down gently to release some juice. What type of rum goes in a mojito? Did you know, the first ever mojito called for BACARDÍ Superior white rum? It’s truly a timeless classic. You can also experiment with gold and flavored rums for a unique twist.
